label: Lost Documents
description: Lost or stolen identity documents such as Aadhaar, PAN, passport
steps: File an FIR at the nearest police station immediately
Block your Aadhaar through UIDAI helpline 1947 or resident.uidai.gov.in
Apply for duplicate documents through official government portals
Notify your bank if cards were lost with the documents
Keep copies of the FIR and acknowledgment receipts
guidance: Report lost Aadhaar to prevent identity misuse
For passport loss, contact the Regional Passport Office
Apply for duplicate PAN through NSDL or UTIITSL portals
Monitor bank accounts for unauthorized activity after document loss
Use DigiLocker to store digital copies of important documents
